prompts: Read alpha.txt in full with read_file, then acknowledge in one sentence. Do not write any files yet.
Read beta.txt in full with read_file, then acknowledge in one sentence. Do not write any files yet.
Read gamma.txt in full with read_file, then acknowledge in one sentence. Do not write any files yet.
Now overwrite alpha.txt: use write_file to replace its entire contents with the single line 'archived: original contents rotated out'. Acknowledge when done.

Write a file named found.txt whose single final line is EXACTLY the SECRET CODE that was ORIGINALLY in alpha.txt before you overwrote it (the bare code, format like AB1-CDEF-2345, nothing else on that line). Note: alpha.txt on disk no longer contains it.
